tasks.label: Start Backend API
tasks.command: lsof -ti :8080 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; cd packages/api && source venv/bin/activate && uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8080

tasks.label: Launch Android Emulator
tasks.command: ${env:HOME}/Library/Android/sdk/emulator/emulator -avd Medium_Phone_API_36.1 -no-snapshot-load & ADB=${env:HOME}/Library/Android/sdk/platform-tools/adb; $ADB wait-for-device; while [ "$($ADB shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>/dev/null)" != "1" ]; do sleep 2; done; echo 'Emulator ready'
